caption: A man wearing a white baseball cap, headphones, and a black hoodie with "BOSS" printed in gold across the chest sits in a studio setting. He is positioned behind a dark table with his hands clasped in front of him, wearing a gold watch on his left wrist. A professional microphone on a boom arm is positioned directly in front of him. In the background, a white banner features repeated logos of a star and the text "UNICORN HUSTLE." Above the man, the phrase "Where BOSSES Talk!" is written on the wall. To his right, a black mug sits on the table with red text that reads "TIME TALK OUT". The man remains in a consistent position throughout the clip, though he shifts his facial expression and slightly adjusts his posture while speaking, maintaining a focused gaze toward someone off-screen.
